title: Table columns
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized to view My Tasks
steps: 1. Open the My Tasks section on the dashboard
expectedResult: The table correctly displays the columns: Delivery Date ("วันที่ส่งมอบ"), Receive Number ("เลขที่ลงรับ"), Project Name ("ชื่อโครงการ"), Department ("หน่วยงาน"), and Status ("สถานะ")

title: Suggestive date color
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized to view My Tasks
steps: 1. View the delivery date of a normal task
expectedResult: The date is displayed with a lighter, suggestive color indicating that action is recommended

title: Status displayed according to department
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized to view My Tasks
steps: 1. Open the My Tasks table
expectedResult: The project status displayed is contextually accurate based on the specific department the logged-in user belongs to

title: Tabs for Procurement Staff
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Procurement Staff ("เจ้าหน้าที่จัดซื้อ")
steps: 1. Login and open My Tasks
expectedResult: The user sees the specific tabs: Not Started Step 1 ("งานยังไม่เริ่ม"), In Progress ("กำลังดำเนินการ"), and Pending Edit ("รอแก้ไข")

title: Tabs for Contract Staff
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Contract Staff ("เจ้าหน้าที่บริหารสัญญา")
steps: 1. Login and open My Tasks
expectedResult: The user sees the specific tabs: Not Started Step 1 ("งานยังไม่เริ่ม"), In Progress ("กำลังดำเนินการ"), Pending Edit ("รอแก้ไข"), and Finance Returned for Edit ("การเงินส่งคืนแก้ไข")

title: Urgent tab
prerequisites: 1. Projects exist with the Urgent ("ด่วน") level
steps: 1. Click on the Urgent ("ด่วน") tab
expectedResult: The system displays only tasks that are marked as Urgent ("ด่วน") and fall under the user's role jurisdiction

title: Most Urgent tab
prerequisites: 1. Projects exist with the Most Urgent ("ด่วนที่สุด") level
steps: 1. Click on the Most Urgent ("ด่วนที่สุด") tab
expectedResult: The system displays only tasks that are marked as Most Urgent ("ด่วนที่สุด") and fall under the user's role jurisdiction

title: Extra Urgent tab
prerequisites: 1. Projects exist with the Extra Urgent ("ด่วนพิเศษ") level
steps: 1. Click on the Extra Urgent ("ด่วนพิเศษ") tab
expectedResult: The system displays only tasks that are marked as Extra Urgent ("ด่วนพิเศษ") and fall under the user's role jurisdiction

title: Loading indicator
prerequisites: 1. Intercept network to delay response of the /projects/own endpoint
steps: 1. Open My Tasks with delayed network
expectedResult: The system displays a loading spinner seamlessly without throwing an error before the response finishes

title: Error state with retry
prerequisites: 1. Intercept network to simulate a backend failure for /projects/own
steps:
1. Open My Tasks
2. Click the "Try Again" ("ลองอีกครั้ง") button
expectedResult: The dashboard initially shows the error message "เกิดข้อผิดพลาดในการโหลดข้อมูลงานของฉัน", and clicking the retry button correctly triggers a data refetch

title: Empty state
prerequisites: 1. The user has no assigned tasks, or a tab is selected that contains no matching data
steps: 1. Open My Tasks or navigate to the empty tab
expectedResult: The system displays a clear empty state message ("ไม่พบข้อมูล") without rendering any empty table rows or pagination controls

title: Urgent and returned task priority in To-Do List
prerequisites: 1. User has tasks with varying priority states
testData: 1 new assignment, 1 returned project, 1 project with contract due in 3 days
steps: 1. Open the To-Do List
expectedResult: Returned and urgent items are strictly sorted at the top of the list with their corresponding UI badges ("Urgent", "Returned")

title: Show workgroup dropdown filter
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized to view the Personal KPI Dashboard
steps: 1. Open the Personal KPI Dashboard page
expectedResult: The system displays a Filter Dropdown for selecting a specific Workgroup ("กลุ่มงาน")

title: Main table columns
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized to view the Personal KPI Dashboard
steps: 1. Open the page and inspect the main data table headers
expectedResult: The table correctly displays the columns: Staff Name ("ชื่อเจ้าหน้าที่"), Total Projects ("จำนวนโครงการที่รับผิดชอบ"), and Average Working Time ("ระยะเวลาการทำงานเฉลี่ย")

title: Default sorting (Top Performance)
prerequisites: 1. The table is populated with multiple staff records
steps: 1. Open the page without manually adjusting any sorting controls
expectedResult: The system sorts the staff table by default based on the shortest Average Working Time first (top performance)

title: Workgroup filter updates table
prerequisites: 1. User is on the Personal KPI Dashboard
testData: A specific Workgroup with known assigned staff
steps: 1. Select a Workgroup from the dropdown filter
expectedResult: The table updates to display only the staff members who are assigned to the selected Workgroup

title: Open individual details section
prerequisites: 1. User is on the Personal KPI Dashboard
steps: 1. Click on a specific staff member's name in the table
expectedResult: The system expands or navigates to an individual analytics section dedicated specifically to that staff member

title: Bar Chart vs Team Benchmark
prerequisites: 1. A specific staff member's detail view is open
steps: 1. Locate the performance Bar Chart
expectedResult: The chart accurately compares the individual staff member's Average Working Time against the overall Average Working Time of their assigned Workgroup (Team Benchmark)

title: Status Summary Card metrics
prerequisites: 1. A specific staff member's detail view is open
steps: 1. Inspect the Status Summary Card
expectedResult: The card successfully renders accurate metric counts for: Total Projects ("โครงการทั้งหมด"), Pending Accept ("รอการตอบรับ"), In Progress ("กำลังดำเนินการ"), Completed ("เสร็จสิ้น"), Canceled ("ยกเลิก"), Urgent ("ด่วน"), Most Urgent ("ด่วนที่สุด"), and Extra Urgent ("ด่วนพิเศษ")

title: Pie Chart for project types
prerequisites: 1. A specific staff member's detail view is open
steps: 1. Inspect the workload Pie Chart
expectedResult: The Pie Chart visually breaks down the proportion of the staff member's projects strictly categorized by Procurement Method ("วิธีจัดหา")

title: Task table matches My Dashboard
prerequisites: 1. A specific staff member's detail view is open
steps: 1. Scroll down below the charts
expectedResult: A detailed task table is rendered matching the structure of My Dashboard, allowing the reviewer to check project-level statuses for that individual

title: Export Dashboard/Table as PDF
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Overview Dashboard
steps: 1. Click the Export PDF button on the dashboard or table
expectedResult: The system generates a PDF file that accurately preserves the visual layout and design of the current screen

title: Export raw data per chart
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Overview Dashboard
steps: 1. Click the Export Excel/CSV button on a specific chart
expectedResult: The system generates an .xlsx or .csv file containing the correct raw background data for that specific chart

title: Time filter Today
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Overview Dashboard
steps: 1. Select the "Today" ("วันนี้") time filter
expectedResult: The dashboard aggregates and displays data specifically for the current day

title: Time filter This Month
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Overview Dashboard
steps: 1. Select the "This Month" ("เดือนนี้") time filter
expectedResult: The dashboard aggregates and displays data accumulated from the 1st of the current month up to the present day

title: Time filter Fiscal Year
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Overview Dashboard
steps: 1. Select the "Fiscal Year" ("ปีงบประมาณ") time filter
expectedResult: The dashboard aggregates and displays data accumulated from October 1st of the current fiscal year up to the present day

title: Performance tracking comparisons
prerequisites: 1. User applies a time filter
steps: 1. Inspect the numeric comparison indicators next to key metrics
expectedResult: The system accurately shows the delta (increase/decrease/unchanged) compared to the preceding equivalent period (yesterday, last month, last year)

title: Definition of New Tasks metric
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Overview Dashboard
steps: 1. Select a time filter and check the New Tasks ("งานที่เพิ่มใหม่") metric
expectedResult: The metric correctly counts all projects added from Central Admin or keyed in via forms during the selected time period

title: Definition of Completed Tasks metric
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Overview Dashboard
steps: 1. Check the Completed Tasks ("งานที่แล้วเสร็จ") metric
expectedResult: The metric correctly counts only the projects that achieved the Completed status within the selected time period

title: Definition of Pending Tasks metric
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Overview Dashboard
steps: 1. Check the Pending Tasks ("งานคงค้าง") metric
expectedResult: The metric correctly counts all projects that are currently in progress during the selected time period

title: Filter visible to Admin shows all departments
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as Central Procurement ("พัสดุกลาง") or an Admin
steps: 1. Open the Overview Dashboard and check the department filter
expectedResult: The user can view and filter data across all departments in the system

title: Filter visible to Unit users shows only their own unit
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as a standard Unit user
steps: 1. Open the Overview Dashboard and check the department filter
expectedResult: Data is strictly limited to the user's own unit and they cannot filter to view other departments

title: Time filter updates procurement overview graph
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Overview Dashboard
steps: 1. Change the time filter
expectedResult: The procurement overview graph dynamically updates its X-axis and data points by month, quarter, or fiscal year based on the selection

title: Pie Chart ratio of projects
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Overview Dashboard
steps: 1. Inspect the project ratio Pie Chart
expectedResult: The Pie Chart successfully separates data into the 6 procurement types and is visible to all authorized roles

title: Bar Chart 5 statuses for Central Procurement
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as Central Procurement ("พัสดุกลาง")
steps: 1. Open the Overview Dashboard and locate the Status Bar Chart
expectedResult: The Bar Chart distinctly displays 5 statuses: Unassigned ("ยังไม่ได้มอบหมาย"), Pending Accept ("รอการตอบรับ"), In Progress ("กำลังดำเนินการ"), Completed ("เสร็จสิ้น"), and Canceled ("ยกเลิก")

title: Bar Chart 4 statuses for external units
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as an External Unit ("หน่วยงานภายนอก")
steps: 1. Open the Overview Dashboard and locate the Status Bar Chart
expectedResult: The Bar Chart distinctly displays 4 statuses: Not Started ("ยังไม่เริ่ม"), In Progress ("กำลังดำเนินการ"), Completed ("เสร็จสิ้น"), and Canceled ("ยกเลิก")

title: Executives do not see status Bar Chart
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as an Executive ("ผู้บริหาร")
steps: 1. Open the Overview Dashboard
expectedResult: The operational Status Bar Chart is intentionally hidden based on the executive view conditions

title: Pie Chart for Capital Budget
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized to view the Capital Budget Pie Chart
steps: 1. Open the dashboard and inspect the Capital Budget Pie Chart ("งบลงทุน")
expectedResult: The chart correctly displays the number of equipment budget plans and budget amounts separated by funding categories

title: Executives do not see Capital Budget Pie Chart
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as an Executive ("ผู้บริหาร")
steps: 1. Open the Overview Dashboard
expectedResult: The Capital Budget Pie Chart is intentionally hidden based on the executive view conditions

title: Task Trend Line Chart
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Overview Dashboard
steps: 1. Inspect the Task Trend Line Chart ("แนวโน้มปริมาณงาน (6 เดือนล่าสุด)")
expectedResult: The chart accurately overlays the trend of incoming tasks versus completed tasks across the timeline

title: Access Late & Upcoming Deadlines section
prerequisites: 1. User has the correct permissions
steps: 1. Open the Overview Dashboard
expectedResult: The user successfully sees the Late & Upcoming Deadlines section

title: Blocked from seeing deadline section
prerequisites: 1. User lacks the specific permissions for deadline tracking
steps: 1. Open the Overview Dashboard
expectedResult: The Late & Upcoming Deadlines section is hidden from the user

title: Overdue table columns
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Late & Upcoming Deadlines section
steps: 1. Inspect the Overdue Tasks ("ล่าช้ากว่ากำหนด") table
expectedResult: The table specifically displays: Project Name ("ชื่อโครงการ"), Days Overdue ("จำนวนวันที่ล่าช้า"), and Due Date ("วันครบกำหนดส่งมอบ")

title: Overdue sort descending
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Overdue Tasks ("งานล่าช้า") table
steps: 1. Inspect the sorting order of the tasks
expectedResult: The system sorts the tasks by the number of Days Overdue in descending order (highest delay first)

title: Overdue total vs plan metric
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the overdue section
steps: 1. Inspect the overdue summary metric
expectedResult: The system displays the total number of overdue tasks relative to the overall planned tasks

title: Due Soon table columns
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Late & Upcoming Deadlines section
steps: 1. Inspect the Due Soon ("ใกล้ครบกำหนด") table
expectedResult: The table specifically displays: Project Name ("ชื่อโครงการ") and Due Date ("วันครบกำหนดส่งมอบ")

title: Due Soon sort ascending
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Due Soon ("ใกล้ครบกำหนด") table
steps: 1. Inspect the sorting order of the tasks
expectedResult: The system sorts the tasks by the remaining time in ascending order (closest deadline first)

title: Priority level labels
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Due Soon table
steps: 1. Inspect the priority labels assigned to tasks based on their remaining time
expectedResult: Tasks due within 5 days are labeled Urgent ("เร่งด่วน"), within 7 days are Watch ("เฝ้าระวัง"), and within 10 days are Normal ("ปกติ")

title: Due Soon limited to 10 days
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Due Soon table
steps: 1. Check the tasks populated in the Due Soon list
expectedResult: The table strictly filters and displays only tasks that are due within the upcoming 10 days

title: Pagination
prerequisites: 1. A table in the dashboard has more rows than the page size limit
steps: 1. Interact with the table pagination controls
expectedResult: The system renders pagination controls and allows the user to correctly navigate between pages

title: Workload graph accuracy and role-based filtering
prerequisites: 1. Data exists for both Unit Heads and General Staff
steps:
1. Login as Head of Unit and view workload chart
2. Login as General Staff and view workload chart
expectedResult:
1. Head sees active project counts for all staff in the unit.
2. Staff user sees only their own workload count.

title: My Unit header metadata rendering
prerequisites: 1. User is Head of Unit
steps: 1. Log in as Head of Unit and open My Unit page
expectedResult: Responsible procurement methods and unit head name display correctly at the top header

title: Export PDF retains layout
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the KPI Dashboard
steps: 1. Click the Export PDF button
expectedResult: The system generates a PDF that accurately retains the layout of the dashboard or table exactly as shown on screen

title: Export raw data per chart
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the KPI Dashboard
steps: 1. Click the Export Excel/CSV button on a specific graph
expectedResult: The system correctly generates the raw data in .xlsx or .csv format corresponding to the selected graph

title: Monthly Filter
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the KPI Dashboard
steps: 1. Select a monthly time period filter
expectedResult: The KPI data dynamically updates to accurately reflect the selected month

title: Quarterly Filter
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the KPI Dashboard
steps: 1. Select a quarterly time period filter
expectedResult: The KPI data dynamically updates to accurately reflect the selected quarter

title: Fiscal Year Filter
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the KPI Dashboard
steps: 1. Select a fiscal year time period filter
expectedResult: The KPI data dynamically updates to accurately reflect the selected fiscal year

title: Central Procurement/Executive sees all workgroups
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as Central Procurement ("พัสดุกลาง") or an Executive ("ผู้บริหาร")
steps: 1. Open the KPI Dashboard
expectedResult: The user has visibility into the overarching data from all Workgroups ("กลุ่มงาน") across the entire organization

title: Unit Head/Staff sees only their own workgroup
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as a Unit Head or Staff member
steps: 1. Open the KPI Dashboard
expectedResult: Data is strictly limited to information originating from the Workgroup to which the user belongs

title: Average Cycle Time by Workgroup
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the KPI Dashboard
steps: 1. Open the dashboard and inspect the metrics
expectedResult: The system accurately calculates and displays the Average Cycle Time ("ระยะเวลาการทำงานเฉลี่ย") for each distinct Workgroup

title: Stacked Bar Total Projects by Workgroup
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the KPI Dashboard
steps: 1. Inspect the workgroup-level graph
expectedResult: The Stacked Bar chart accurately displays the total number of projects for each Workgroup separated by Procurement Method ("วิธีจัดหา")

title: Stacked Bar Overdue Projects by Workgroup
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the KPI Dashboard
steps: 1. Inspect the overdue-level graph by workgroup
expectedResult: The Stacked Bar chart accurately displays the number of Overdue Tasks ("ล่าช้ากว่ากำหนด") for each Workgroup separated by Procurement Method ("วิธีจัดหา")

title: Average duration split into 2 phases
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the KPI Dashboard
steps: 1. Inspect the Average Cycle Time Stacked Bar Chart broken down by Procurement Method
expectedResult: The chart correctly segments the total duration into two visually distinct phases: Procurement Phase ("ระยะเวลาการทำงานจัดซื้อ/จ้าง") and Contract Phase ("ระยะเวลาการทำงานบริหารสัญญา")

title: Number of projects by status
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the KPI Dashboard
steps: 1. Inspect the status-level Stacked Bar chart
expectedResult: The chart distinctly displays Unassigned ("ยังไม่ได้มอบหมาย"), Pending Accept ("รอการตอบรับ"), In Progress ("กำลังดำเนินการ"), Completed ("เสร็จสิ้น"), and Canceled ("ยกเลิก")

title: % Overdue Rate
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the KPI Dashboard
steps: 1. Inspect the % Overdue Rate numeric indicator
expectedResult: The percentage of Overdue Tasks ("ล่าช้ากว่ากำหนด") is accurately calculated relative to the total number of tasks in that respective method

title: Daily change comparison
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the KPI Dashboard
steps: 1. Inspect the delta comparison numeric values relative to the previous day
expectedResult: The system accurately shows the delta indicating whether the value has Increased ("เพิ่มขึ้น"), Decreased ("ลดลง"), or is Unchanged ("เท่าเดิม")

title: Top 5 Longest Projects
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the KPI Dashboard
steps: 1. Inspect the project ranking section
expectedResult: The system correctly identifies and ranks the Top 5 Longest Projects ("โครงการที่ใช้เวลานานที่สุด 5 อันดับ") separated by each procurement method

title: Analyze bottleneck phase
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the KPI Dashboard
steps: 1. Inspect the Bottleneck Analysis ("ขั้นตอนที่ใช้เวลามากที่สุด") section
expectedResult: The system accurately calculates and displays the specific workflow steps that consume the highest average time from the defined step groups

title: Bottleneck groups calculation
prerequisites: 1. User is inspecting the Bottleneck Analysis logic
steps: 1. Verify the underlying calculation formulas for the bottleneck grouped phases
expectedResult: The "Review and Approve" bottleneck accurately sums (Head Approval + Offer Sign + Signing), and the "Revision" bottleneck accurately sums (Staff Revision + Finance Revision)

title: KPI Scorecard average cycle time YoY
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Executive Dashboard
steps: 1. Open the Executive Dashboard and check the KPI Scorecard
expectedResult: The dashboard prominently displays the total Average Cycle Time with a comparison against the prior year (YoY) using large typography

title: % On-Time completion rate
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the KPI Scorecard
steps: 1. Inspect the completion metrics on the KPI Scorecard
expectedResult: The system correctly displays the % On-Time Completion ("งานที่เสร็จตามกำหนด") calculated against the total finalized tasks

title: Trend Line workload and cycle time
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the KPI Dashboard
steps: 1. Inspect the Trend Line Chart
expectedResult: The chart correctly displays the trend of task volume and working duration per month, enabling the user to identify operational Peak Seasons

title: Summary Cards for Procurement Staff
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as Procurement Staff ("เจ้าหน้าที่พัสดุ")
steps: 1. Open the Home Page
expectedResult: The system displays summary cards exactly for: Total Projects ("โครงการทั้งหมด"), Unassigned ("ยังไม่ได้มอบหมาย"), Pending Accept ("รอการตอบรับ"), In Progress ("กำลังดำเนินการ"), Completed ("เสร็จสิ้น"), Canceled ("ยกเลิก"), Urgent ("ด่วน"), Most Urgent ("ด่วนที่สุด"), and Extra Urgent ("ด่วนพิเศษ")

title: Summary Cards for External Unit
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as an External Unit ("หน่วยงานภายนอก")
steps: 1. Open the Home Page
expectedResult: The system displays summary cards exactly for: Total Projects ("โครงการทั้งหมด"), Not Started ("ยังไม่เริ่ม"), In Progress ("กำลังดำเนินการ"), Completed ("เสร็จสิ้น"), Canceled ("ยกเลิก"), Urgent ("ด่วน"), Most Urgent ("ด่วนที่สุด"), and Extra Urgent ("ด่วนพิเศษ")

title: Procurement sees all units
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as Procurement Staff ("เจ้าหน้าที่พัสดุ")
steps: 1. Open the Procurement Summary Report on the Home Page
expectedResult: The user has visibility into the data from all units and can actively use the unit filter

title: External Unit locked to own data
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as an External Unit ("หน่วยงานภายนอก")
steps: 1. Open the Procurement Summary Report on the Home Page
expectedResult: The data is strictly locked to the user's unit, and they cannot interact with or change the unit filter

title: Global filter Fiscal Year
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Home Page
steps: 1. Select a Fiscal Year from the global filter
expectedResult: The entire Home Page report dynamically updates to reflect the selected fiscal year

title: Global filter Start-End Date
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Home Page
steps: 1. Specify a custom Start and End Date range
expectedResult: The entire Home Page report dynamically updates to reflect the specified historical date range

title: Procurement method Pie/Bar Chart
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Home Page charts
steps: 1. Inspect the procurement method Pie/Bar Chart
expectedResult: The chart correctly displays the proportions accurately segmented by the 6 defined procurement methods

title: Total Budget metric
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Home Page key metrics
steps: 1. Inspect the Total Budget ("งบประมาณรวม") indicator
expectedResult: The system correctly calculates and displays the overarching total budget as defined in the annual plan

title: Used Budget metric
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Home Page key metrics
steps: 1. Inspect the Used Budget ("งบประมาณที่ใช้ไป") indicator
expectedResult: The system correctly calculates and displays the combined budget amount of all projects that have officially started processing

title: Plan statistics
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Home Page key metrics
steps: 1. Inspect the Plan Statistics section
expectedResult: The section accurately displays metrics for: Total Plans ("จำนวนแผนทั้งหมด"), Unused ("ยังไม่ถูกใช้"), In Progress ("กำลังดำเนินการ"), and Completed ("ดำเนินการเสร็จสิ้น")

title: Plan table columns
prerequisites: 1. User is viewing the Plan Table on the Home Page
steps: 1. Inspect the table headers
expectedResult: The table correctly renders: Activity Type ("ประเภทกิจกรรม"), Item Name ("ชื่อรายการ"), Details ("รายละเอียด"), Cost Center ("ศูนย์ต้นทุน"), Unit ("หน่วยงาน"), Budget Amount ("วงเงินงบประมาณ"), and Status ("สถานะ")

title: Plan status: Not Started
prerequisites: 1. A plan has not yet been attached to any active project
steps: 1. Locate the unused plan in the Plan Table
expectedResult: The system sets the plan's status to Not Started ("ยังไม่ได้ดำเนินการ")

title: Plan status: In Progress
prerequisites: 1. A plan is linked to a project that is currently open/active
steps: 1. Locate the specific plan in the Plan Table
expectedResult: The system automatically sets the plan's status to In Progress ("กำลังดำเนินการ")

title: Plan status: Completed
prerequisites: 1. A plan is linked to a project that has been fully closed via Finance export
steps: 1. Locate the closed plan in the Plan Table
expectedResult: The system automatically sets the plan's status to Completed ("ดำเนินการเรียบร้อย")

title: Click plan navigates to project
prerequisites: 1. The Plan Table contains active plan rows
steps: 1. Click anywhere on a specific plan row in the table
expectedResult: The system correctly routes the user directly to the detail page of the project associated with that plan

title: Procurement timeline calendar visibility
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as Unit Representative
steps: 1. Open the Home Page dashboard
expectedResult: The uploaded procurement timeline image/calendar is successfully rendered and fully visible
